scenarios.reasoning: RHEL 7 reached end-of-life on June 30, 2024. No further security patches are available. The operating system must be upgraded to RHEL 8 or 9 (or equivalent) to restore security compliance.
triggered_by: Operating System no longer receiving security patches

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.reasoning: RHEL 7 is already a standard Linux distribution. The application already runs on standard Linux, satisfying this scenario's objective. However, an OS upgrade within the Linux family is still required due to EOL status.
CRMApp-002 is 3rd party software. ARM CPU migration requires vendor support and certification. Third-party software is excluded from this scenario as migration is vendor-controlled.
blocked_by: 3rd party software - vendor controls architecture compatibility

scenarios.reasoning: WebSphere 7.0 reached end-of-service on September 30, 2015 - over 10 years ago. This represents a critical security and supportability risk. Migration to a modern application server (e.g., WebSphere Liberty, WildFly, or Tomcat) is urgently needed.
triggered_by: Application server no longer receiving security patches

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.reasoning: CRMApp-002 is already deployed on AWS. The application meets the cloud deployment objective.
CRMApp-002 is 3rd party software. Containerization is vendor-controlled and cannot be independently applied. Excluded from this scenario.
blocked_by: 3rd party software - containerization is vendor responsibility

scenarios.reasoning: CRMApp-002 is 3rd party software. Application refactoring is not feasible as source code is vendor-owned. Integration improvements via APIs are possible but full refactoring is excluded.
blocked_by: 3rd party software - source code not accessible for refactoring

scenarios.reasoning: Amazon RDS MySQL is a fully managed AWS service. AWS manages version upgrades and patching. The database is classified as CURRENT_VERSION. No legacy database upgrade action required.
blocked_by: Amazon RDS MySQL is a managed service - AWS handles upgrades

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.reasoning: MySQL is already an open-source database engine. This scenario objective is already satisfied.
CRMApp-002 is 3rd party software. Component updates are vendor-managed and cannot be independently applied. Vendor upgrade path should be followed for RHEL and WebSphere components.
blocked_by: 3rd party software - component updates managed by vendor
